# API Checklist: Return a Low/High Range

**Purpose**: Validate API requirements clarity, completeness, and coverage for range output.
**Created**: 2026-03-10
**Feature**: `/home/ayra/ECE_493/Capstone-Test-Repo/specs/014-low-high-range/spec.md`

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [x] CHK001 Are request/response schemas fully specified for success, range unavailable, and range adjusted cases? [Completeness, Spec §Functional Requirements, Spec §Alternate Flows, Spec §Exception / Error Flows]
- [x] CHK002 Are response fields specified for timestamp, range metadata, and warnings? [Completeness, Spec §Functional Requirements]

## Requirement Clarity

- [x] CHK003 Are interval level and range type metadata rules explicitly defined for API consumers? [Clarity, Spec §Functional Requirements]
- [x] CHK004 Are guardrail behaviors for invalid ranges explicitly defined for API consumers? [Clarity, Spec §Functional Requirements]

## Requirement Consistency

- [x] CHK005 Do API requirements align with UI flow requirements for range labeling and disclaimers? [Consistency, Spec §Functional Requirements, Spec §Acceptance Scenarios]

## Scenario Coverage

- [x] CHK006 Are requirements defined for API behavior when range computation fails? [Coverage, Spec §Alternate Flows]
